# Yggdrasil Design System — "Graphite Iris"

The single, central design system for every *.exe.pm app. If you are an agent
building or editing one of these apps, use this — do NOT invent per-app palettes,
buttons, spacing, or components. One change here repaints every site.

Source: https://github.com/kschmidtlarsen/design-system
Live showcase (all components, light + dark): https://design.exe.pm
Stylesheet: https://design.exe.pm/latest/iris.css
Tailwind preset: https://design.exe.pm/latest/tailwind-preset.js

## Use it (no build step)

Add to every app's <head>, BEFORE the Tailwind CDN script:

    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://design.exe.pm/latest/iris.css">
    <script src="https://design.exe.pm/latest/tailwind-preset.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <script>tailwind.config = { presets: [YGGDRASIL_DESIGN] }</script>

Set the theme on <html>: data-theme="dark" (default) or data-theme="light".

Then style with either:
- Tailwind utilities mapped to tokens: bg-bg, bg-surface, bg-surface-2, text-ink,
  text-muted, text-faint, border-line, bg-accent, text-accent-ink, rounded, etc.
- Component classes: .ys-btn (--primary/--secondary/--ghost/--danger/--invert),
  .ys-card, .ys-field/.ys-input, .ys-rail/.ys-nav, .ys-pill (--accent/--ok/--warn/--bad),
  .ys-tag, .ys-itag, .ys-kbd, .ys-table, .ys-seg, .ys-stone, plus motion helpers
  .ys-spinner/.ys-reveal/.ys-typing/.ys-live-dot.

## Tokens (CSS custom properties; light + dark both defined)

--bg --surface --surface-2 --line --line-2 --ink --muted --faint
--accent (#6C63D6 iris) --accent-ink --accent-2 --accent-surface --on-accent
--ok --warn --bad --radius (3px) --invert-surface/-ink/-line/-muted
--stone-c --stone-f (matte texture) --font-sans --font-mono

## If a site needs something specific (override ladder — cheapest first)

1. Retune a token locally, AFTER loading iris.css:
       :root { --accent: #0E8FA3; }
   The site looks different but stays in the system and keeps getting updates.
2. Add a namespaced component in the app's own CSS, built from shared tokens
   (var(--surface), var(--line), var(--radius)).
3. Scope-opt-out for a genuine one-off (rare).

HARD RULE: never fork or copy the core .ys-* component CSS into an app. That
reintroduces drift — the exact thing this system exists to kill.

## Anti-"AI shine" — a rule, not a preference

No gradients. No glow (shadows are neutral, never coloured). No glassmorphism.
No gradient text. No emoji as icons. No neon saturation. Emphasis and warmth come
from flat fills, hairline borders, the stone texture, and motion that maps to real
system state (a request in flight, a deploy running) — never decoration.

## Versioning

/latest/ is the live channel — link this; edits reach every site on next load.
/vN/ are immutable snapshots kept only for rollback; apps should not link them.
